package rulecoverage

func PositiveEventPublishBeforeTransactionCommit() string {
    ruleID := "event_publish_before_transaction_commit"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Event or message publication before durable commit is confirmed."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
